name: RexBots File-to-Link Bot
description: A Telegram bot that converts files to streamable/downloadable links via a web server.

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID from https://my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API Hash from https://my.telegram.org

ADMINS.description: Your Telegram user ID (space-separated for multiple admins)

BIN_CHANNEL.description: Channel ID for storing files (e.g. -1001234567890). Bot must be admin here.

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Channel ID for bot logs (e.g. -1009876543210). Bot must be admin here.

VERIFIED_LOG.description: Channel ID for verified user logs

BOT_USERNAME.description: Your bot's username without the @ symbol

APP_NAME.description: Your Heroku app name (used for self-ping to prevent sleeping)

WEB_SERVER_BIND_ADDRESS.description: Your Heroku app domain, e.g. your-app-name.herokuapp.com (no https://)

AUTH_CHANNEL.description: Force-subscribe channel IDs (space-separated). Leave blank to disable.

CHANNEL.description: Your public Telegram channel link (e.g. https://t.me/YourChannel)

HAS_SSL.description: Set to true (Heroku provides SSL by default)

NO_PORT.description: Set to true for Heroku (port is managed by Heroku)

PORT.description: Web server port (Heroku sets this automatically)

PROTECT_CONTENT.description: Prevent users from forwarding bot messages (true/false)

PING_INTERVAL.description: Seconds between self-pings to keep the dyno alive (1200 = 20 mins)
